nasb.text: For each one threw down his staff and they turned into serpents. But Aaron’s staff swallowed up their staffs.

esv.text: For each man cast down his staff, and they became serpents. But Aaron’s staff swallowed up their staffs.

cnv.text: 他們各人都丟下自己的手杖，手杖就變了蛇；亞倫的手杖卻吞了他們的手杖。

ccb.text: 各人将自己的手杖扔在地上，杖就变作蛇，但亚伦的杖吞噬了他们的杖。
